hero_subtitle: Specialists in the financial sector. We support banks and insurers in their digital transformation with tailored solutions.
historia_p1: Inorme S.L. was founded in 1993 by a group of professionals expert in IT and Consulting in the financial services sector.
historia_p2: Our guide is to ensure success and benefits for our clients, achieving the highest levels of specialisation, quality and experience in our products and services with cutting-edge technology.
historia_p3: As a result of this policy, we have achieved a high level of loyalty among our clients and employees: over 80% of business is generated by a stable client base, served by the partners who form the core of Inorme plus a team of professionals with low turnover, ensuring continuity of the team responsible for development throughout the project lifecycle.
historia_p4: We offer and will continue to offer innovative solutions and ideas, as well as a wide range of products always adapted to the market. Focused on the Spanish financial market, with operations in the Portuguese, French, German and English markets.
historia_li1: Professionalism and depth in the financial market in general and the Spanish market in particular.
historia_li2: Wide range of specialised, high-quality financial products, integrated into major financial technology solutions.
historia_li3: Modular solutions with a solid operational base for better adaptability and improvement.
historia_li4: Rapid, secure and professional response capability to technological, financial and regulatory change.
historia_li5: Comprehensive global solutions: development, integration, maintenance and professional services. BPO services.
about_compromiso_desc: We engage in each project as if it were our own.
about_innovacion_desc: The latest technologies and methodologies on the market.
about_confianza_desc: Long-lasting relationships based on transparency and results.
about_excelencia_desc: The highest quality standards in every delivery.
contact_intro: Tell us your needs and we will propose the best solution in IT, organisation and methods.

contact_toast_desc: We will get back to you as soon as possible.

footer_tagline: Information technology, organisation and methods. Technology consultancy specialised in the financial sector.

testimonial1_quote: Inorme combines sector knowledge with solid technical solutions. A reliable partner for digital transformation.
testimonial2_quote: Professionalism and commitment on every project. We trust Inorme for initiatives that require rigour and experience.
